title: 宝塚記念の後に・勝負の行方

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The head-to-head between the Otherworldly
Front-Runner and the Empress has been settled!
Air Groove is victorious!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Suzukaaa! She was sooo close!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Right? I don't know why, but I couldn't take my
eyes off her!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I couldn't catch up!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sure enough, I was able to secure victory today...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: But this is nothing like how I imagined!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You crossed the finish line after me, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Everyone only had eyes for you! All they cared
about was you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I won the race, yet somehow I didn't surpass you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka looked so powerful and free
during the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She stole everyone's attention, and Air Groove is
clearly sensitive to the fact she was outshone.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Don't you dare try and console me, Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'll do what I must. You do the same.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Just promise me one thing: when I've grown
strong enough to be worthy of the title of
Empress...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
And when that time comes, I will be challenging
you once again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Not shying away from Air Groove's blazing eyes,
Silence Suzuka nods in solemn agreement.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove and Silence Suzuka shake hands,
sealing their promise to challenge each other
once more.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I don't think I'll forget what happened today for a
long while...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I could hear Air Groove's heartbeat while we were
racing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
And I could feel her passion burning right beside
me.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
That's precisely why I couldn't give up my lead to
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka's eyes shine as if the passion that
burned inside the Empress has spread, and
smolders within her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I want to become even faster.
choice_data_list: We've got summer camp to get through first.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Right!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Thank you. Good night.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch as she enters the dorm. But just as I'm
about to make my way home, a wail cuts through
the air.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Por quuuuué?! I can't believe it! SUZUKAAA!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: El, it's late. Keep your voice down, okay?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Right! Sorry!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But... I was watching from the stands!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even though Suzuka didn't win, her performance
totally blew me away!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It feels like there's no way I can beat her! This
sucks! This sucks, this sucks, this sucks, this sucks!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
How can I ever become the world's strongest
racer now?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Gaaah! You've got this, El! Fight! FIGHT! Run!
Run! ÁNDALE!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: Sigh. El, you really need to keep it down.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
She really took off like the wind, though, didn't
she?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the curtains open on a new challenge.
